prompt: Review PR #4538 in DataDog/dd-trace-go. It promotes span fields out of the meta map into a typed SpanAttributes struct.

assertions.text: Questions the naming choice - suggests ReadOnly is clearer than Shared for the COW marker
Notes that the attrs field name in SpanMeta doesn't convey its role (should be sharedAttrs or promotedAttrs)
Flags that sharedAttrs implementation detail leaks to mocktracer via go:linkname signature change
Suggests extracting shared-attrs building logic into a helper function
Notes that consumers of SpanMeta should use methods, not access m and attrs fields directly
